title: System Design Patterns
author: HackerOne
date: 2024-02-25
description: Battle-tested patterns for building reliable distributed systems
tags: ["#systemdesign", "#architecture"]
---
Battle-tested patterns for building reliable distributed systems. These patterns appear again and again in production systems.

1. Circuit Breaker — prevent cascade failures
2. Bulkhead — isolate components
3. Saga — manage distributed transactions
4. CQRS — separate reads and writes
